title: MySqlDataReader.GetFieldValue<Stream> throws InvalidCastException
key_bug_features: GetFieldValue<Stream> throws InvalidCastException for BINARY column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, data BINARY(4), nullable_data BINARY(4) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table(id, data) VALUES(1, X'00112233');
INSERT INTO test_table(id, data, nullable_data) VALUES(2, X'AAFFBBCC', NULL);
SELECT id, COALESCE(data, nullable_data) AS combined_data FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, LENGTH(data) AS data_length FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
